subcodes.first_line: O God of Names and Creator of heaven! Thou knowest and seest that there hath reached the prison a letter from one of Thy loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء تعلم و تری قد حضر فی السجن کتاب من احد احبائک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @the cloud ['ama], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @imagery in the Qur'an
